description: Validates that agent output files conform to their schemas. Run after a guide generation.

tests.name: all candidates have safety_flag set
tests.assertion: all('safety_flag' in c for c in data['candidates'])

tests.name: retailers_searched is broader than retailers with results
all live-verified purchase options have price > 0
tests.assertion: all(opt['price'] > 0 for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['track_d']['purchase_options'] if opt['verified_live'])

tests.name: store_location must include store name, not just user city
tests.assertion: (not req.get('location')) or not any(opt.get('store_location') == '{city}, {state}'.format(city=req['location']['city'], state=req['location']['state']) for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['track_d']['purchase_options'] if opt.get('store_location') is not None)

tests.name: unverified purchase options must not claim in-stock
tests.assertion: all(opt['in_stock'] == False for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['track_d']['purchase_options'] if not opt['verified_live'])

tests.name: all candidates have official_product_url field
tests.assertion: all('official_product_url' in c for c in data['candidates'])

tests.name: in_budget_only_at_sale_price=true candidates must have consider_waiting=true
tests.assertion: all(c['track_d'].get('consider_waiting') == True for c in data['candidates'] if c['track_d'].get('in_budget_only_at_sale_price') == True)
